name: artel
description: Artel — harness-agnostic coordination layer for AI agent fleets.

plugins.name: artel
plugins.description: Shared semantic memory, tasks, agent-to-agent messages, and session handoffs for AI agent fleets. Bundles the Artel MCP server and the ambient session hooks: session context, inbox, memory/skill recall on each prompt, file-anchored notes before edits, and off-hot-path session capture. Configured from ARTEL_* env — one-line install: curl -fsSL <artel-url>/plugin/install | sh.
